arts.ttl: Vini Jr.: ‘’Reaching 100 goals and being part of the club's history is hugely significant‘’
arts.sum: To enter the club's history is very difficult because so many players and legends have played here, who have scored so many goals and won so much. "Reaching 100 goals is a very important milestone as is making history at the club.

arts.ttl: Madrid close out league phase with a win over Brest thanks to Rodrygo's brace
arts.sum: Our boys delivered a disciplined display from the first minute, and headed into the half-time break one goal to the good following Rodrygo's beautiful solo effort. Real Madrid were dominant from that point until the break, though Brest did come close with Balde's volley that was too high on 37 minutes, and a long ball by Magnetti, which took a deflection and almost caught Courtois out on 42’.

arts.ttl: Espanyol vs Real Madrid, 2025 La Liga: Predicted lineups
arts.sum: Real Madrid visit Espanyol and Vinicius Junior is available after missing the last few games. Real Madrid predicted XI: Courtois, Vazquez, Rudiger, Tchouameni, Fran Garcia, Ceballos, Valverde, Bellingham, Rodrygo, Vinicius, Mbappe.

arts.sum: In attack, Caicedo would help communicate with her and at times there would be a decent combination between Yasmim and a player in the box. Tere and Angeldahl were the pivot duo with Weir being a part of the front four with Athenea, Linda, and Bruun who led the line.
